km.Roma, Lazio, Itália: រ៉ុម៉ា, ឡាស៊ីo, ប្រទេសអ៊ីតាលី

zh.lifeSummary: cencio papa於1135年出生在義大利拉其羅馬。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1191年在他的家鄉享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: cencio papa于1135年出生在意大利拉其羅馬。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于1191年在他的家乡享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: cencio
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Miguel, Humberto, Leopoldo, Catalina, Laureano, Rodolfo, Silvia, Altagracia, Arcadio, Armando.
Galician: habitational name from Cancio in Lugo (Galicia, Spain).

nameMeanings.name: papa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Mario, Rosario, Domenic, Alfonso, Eduardo, Antonio, Basilio, Carmelo, Emidio, Ettore, Gino, Marco, Pasquale, Pellegrino, Pietro, Ricardo, Rodolfo.  Spanish Salvador, Joselito, Nicanor, Rolando.

Italian: nickname from papa ‘father, cleric, pope’. In southern Italy it is generally a nickname for someone thought to resemble a priest or, in some cases, for the illegitimate child of a priest, but in the North it is more often a nickname meaning ‘pope’, denoting a vain or pompous man. In some parts of Calabria the term is also signifies ‘uncle’.
American shortened form (and Greek feminine form, denoting ‘the daughter, or wife of’) of Greek Papas ‘priest’ and of patronymics beginning with Papa-, for example Papageorgiou .

variants.name: Papalia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Angelo, Francesco, Nazareno, Orazio, Salvatore.
Italian: status name from papa ‘priest, father’ (see Papa ) + the personal name Elìa (see Elias ).

variants.name: Papas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Greek Constantine, Costas, Andreas, Spiros, Emilios, Georgios, Ourania, Rigas, Sotiris, Spiro, Takis, Tasos.

Greek: status name from papas ‘priest’ or a (usually American) shortened form of any of numerous Greek patronymics beginning with Papa- (see e.g. Papageorgiou , compare Papa ). In the Orthodox Church priests are allowed to marry and have children, so there is nothing unusual about this term having become a surname. Compare Pappas .

variants.name: Papaleo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Valentino, Angelo, Carlo, Carmela, Carmelo, Cosimo, Domenico, Luciano, Orlando, Rocci, Ronaldo, Tito.
Italian: status name from papa ‘priest, father’ (see Papa ) + the personal name Leo.

variants.name: Papania
meanings: Italian (Sicily): from papa ‘priest, father’ (see Papa ) + the personal name Ania, a short form of Anania .

variants.name: Papandrea
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Sal, Pasquale, Salvatore.
Italian: status name from papa ‘priest, father’ (see Papa ) + the personal name Andrea (see Andreas ).
In some cases also an American shortened form of Greek Papandreas: status name meaning ‘Andreas the priest’, from papas ‘priest’ (see Papas ) + the personal name Andreas .

en.lifeSummary: cencio papa was born in 1135, in Roma, Lazio, Italy. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1191, in his hometown, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: cencio papa est né en 1135, à Rome, Lazio, Italie. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1191, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: cencio papa wurde 1135 in Roma, Lazio, Italien geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1191 im Alter von 56 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: cencio papa è nato il nel 1135 nel Roma, Lazio, Italia. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1191, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: cencio papaは1135年にイタリアラズオロマで生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1191年に故郷で56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: cencio papa(은)는 1135년 이탈리아 라지오 로마에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1191년 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: cencio papa nasceu em 1135, em Roma, Lazio, Itália. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1191, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: cencio papa родился в 1135 г. в местности рома, лазио, Италия. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1191 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: cencio papa nació en 1135, en Roma, Lazio, Italia. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1191, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años.
